title: Atmospheric Cactus Flower Compat
description: Now cactus flowers generate in atmospheric desert biomes with Vanilla Backport!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/816fbe833a931007d17829109cde855b3aac4f26.png)

## **⚠️ Very important note:**

It requires:

- Atmospheric
- Vanilla Backport

This datapack only works with the latest version of [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) 1.20.1-1.1.5 and later, otherwise, the datapack will not function.

## **⚠️ Note:**

Please keep in mind that this version is still experimental. I'll be improving many things over time. I recommend checking the cactus generation first in a new world before adding it to your survival world. Thank you.

For the rest of the features in Atmospheric, you can check [Vanilla Backport Compat](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vb-compat)

## **📖 About:**

Cactus Flower Compat is a datapack that adds the generation of Vanilla Backport’s floral cacti to desert biomes from Atmospheric that naturally generate cacti.

# Spiny Thicket (Atmospheric)
![Cactus Flowers in Spiny Thicket (Atmospheric)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffbde6c5118db93b6a43fd7f4b2844af3354e419.png)

# Scrubland (Atmospheric)
